Now you can create live stream with PeriscoDroid!

Also you can chat,and share your live streams on Twitter.
.@oscarporterobar on #Periscope: Exposición de misterios y belén expuesto en el Palacio de los Pimentel, Valladolid…

.@JosephWalker3 on #Periscope: Bishop JWW3 Don't be a Christian with no balance
Add your account to create live stream , chat and other cool features.
